role_summary: the senior tax c onsultant manages complex tax matters, supervises junior consultants, and  provides advanced tax advisory support.
responsibilities: • review tax computations and filings   • handle complex tax planning and advisory cases   • manage tax assessments, appeals, and notices   • supervise and mentor junior tax team members   • coordinate with clients and tax authorities   • ensure high -quality tax deliverables
qualifications: • ca with strong post -qualification tax experience   • in-depth knowledge of tax laws and interpretatio ns  • leadership and client -handling skills
